title: Why Do Ye Call The Poet Lonely.
content:
Why do ye call the poet lonely,
    Because he dreams in lonely places?
    He is not desolate, but only
    Sees, where ye cannot, hidden faces.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Archibald Lampman delivers a powerful performance in "Why Do Ye Call The Poet Lonely."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
